SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "Agreement") is made on this 15th day of October, 2023.

BETWEEN:

1. Dr. Emily Tan, holder of NRIC No. S6543210D, residing at 123 Orchid Road, #08-09, Singapore 098765, contact number +65 9123 4567, email: emily.tan@syntheticmail.sg;

2. Quantum Ventures Pte Ltd, a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN T12LL3456K, having its registered office at 456 Suntec Avenue, #12-34, Singapore 045678, contact number +65 8123 4567, email: info@quantumventures.sg;

3. Mr. John Lim, holder of NRIC No. S7654321F, residing at 789 Newton Crescent, #05-06, Singapore 067890, contact number +65 9223 4567, email: john.lim@fictional.sg;

WHEREAS the parties have agreed to enter into this Agreement to govern their relationship as shareholders of Synthetic Innovations Pte Ltd, with an initial capital contribution of SGD 1,000,000.
